rules.label: Non-compete clause limits
rules.summary: Non-compete is invalid in fixed-term contracts unless the employer demonstrates compelling business interest in writing. Geographic and temporal scope must be reasonable.

rules.label: Trial period cap
rules.summary: Maximum 1 month for contracts under 2 years, maximum 2 months for contracts of 2 years or longer. No trial period in contracts of 6 months or shorter.

rules.label: Statutory notice period
rules.summary: Employer notice is at least 1 month, scaling with length of service up to 4 months. Employee notice is 1 month unless contractually extended (max 6 months and reciprocal).

rules.label: Maximum working hours
rules.summary: Average maximum 48 hours per week over 16 weeks; 12 hours per shift; mandatory rest of 11 consecutive hours per 24 hours. Overrides any clause demanding longer.

rules.label: Instant dismissal
rules.summary: Termination without notice is only valid for urgent cause communicated immediately. Generic 'at-will' termination clauses are unenforceable.

rules.label: Statutory minimum wage
rules.summary: Compensation must meet or exceed the statutory minimum wage for the worker's age, including holiday allowance (vakantiegeld) of at least 8% of gross annual salary.
